text: had another recurring dream where i was transported back to my highschool days, where everything incredibly sucked. in real life highschool wasn't really that bad, but my dreams amplified those bad moments to 11. in fact i've been having the same highschool dreams for 6 times now.

had a dream where i was V1 ultrakill stuck in the backrooms. due to a long standing bug i couldnt hook the skulls and had to grab it. there were at least 4 maurices every single room. sadly there were only ultrakill enemies and not la ruga from calamity mod.

yesterday i dreamt whereas a friend of mine suddenly went furious at me and blocked me on sight. funny enough i talked to them about it, and they thought it was funny and experienced the same, just different circumstances.
